/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/llama-server.dir/server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/llama-server.dir/server-http.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/llama-server.dir/server-models.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-server  -Wl,-rpath,/content/llama.cpp/bin: libserver-context.a ../../common/libcommon.a ../../vendor/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../../bin/libmtmd.so.0.0.8796 ../../bin/libllama.so.0.0.8796 ../../bin/libggml.so.0.9.11 ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.9.11 ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.9.11
